title: Antiquax Marble Wax – Restores Shine & Protects Polished Stone Surfaces | Ideal for Marble, Granite & More 250ml
features: Unmatched Marble Brilliance: Antiquax Marble Wax brings out the natural beauty of your marble surfaces, leaving them gleaming with a radiant, long-lasting shine; elevate the aesthetics of your space effortlessly

Superior Protective Formula: Crafted with a specialized blend, our wax forms a durable shield against stains, spills, and everyday wear; safeguard your marble investment with a product designed for enduring protection

Easy Application, Lasting Results: Effortlessly apply our marble wax, experiencing swift absorption and quick-drying action; achieve a lustrous finish that stands the test of time; aDD TO BASKET now for instant transformation

Versatile Application: Perfect for countertops, floors, and other marble surfaces, this wax is a versatile solution for all your stone care needs; enjoy the adaptability of a product that caters to various applications
description: Product Description A unique blend of waxes designed to enhance the look of all polished stone including marble and slate, whilst adding a degree of protection. Work well into the surface and allow to dry to alight haze. Apply sparingly using a soft cloth. Ingredients Marble Wax Box Contains 1 x Marble Wax 250ml See more
